data.title: AbbVie receives tariff relief, promises $100 billion investment and lower medicine prices for key drugs, including Alphagan, Combigan, Humira, and Synthroid.
data.description: AbbVie Inc. (NYSE: ABBV) has agreed with the Trump administration to enhance access and affordability by offering reduced prices in Medicaid. The pharmaceutical company is committing to investing $100 billion in research and development and capital projects based in the U.S. over the next ten years. AbbVie plans to broaden its direct-to-patient services through TrumpRx for various medications, including Alphagan and Combigan (for ocular hypertension), Humira (for arthritis), and Synthroid (for hypothyroidism). This three-year pact grants AbbVie immunity from tariffs and potential pricing regulations. In a separate deal last week, Johnson & Johnson also...

data.title: Go!Foton will showcase Fiber Slack Panel for high-density AI data centers at 2026 BICSI Winter event.
data.description: A leading company in advanced optics and photonics technology, Go!Foton, recently unveiled the Fiber Slack Panel designed for high-density AI data center fiber optics in Somerset, New Jersey. The product was introduced on January 13, 2026. This innovation aims to provide a solution for extreme fiber optic density in data centers. Go!Foton will be showcasing a range of advanced products at the exhibit.

data.title: PEEPS® debuts 2026 Easter lineup with new flavors and surprises from Bethlehem, Pa. Sweetening the Easter season.
data.description: A beloved Marshmallow brand has returned with fresh flavors and seasonal treats in Bethlehem, Pennsylvania. As of January 13, 2026, the PEEPS® Brand is gearing up to make this Easter extra special. They are introducing a range of new products and surprises for the 2026 season.

data.title: CompTIA adds role-specific courses on responsible AI in sales/marketing. Enhancing AI skills for professionals. Jan 13, 2026.
data.description: In Downers Grove, Illinois on January 13, 2026, sales and marketing professionals are offered new opportunities by CompTIA. This leading provider of vendor-neutral IT training is providing learning options for professionals looking to improve their artificial intelligence (AI) knowledge and skills.

data.title: Trucking Hub sees 9× growth in 2025, reflecting industry's move towards unified operations.
data.description: In January 13, 2026, Chicago, Trucking Hub reported impressive progress in 2025 with a remarkable 9-fold increase in growth compared to the previous year. This growth signifies a notable trend in the industry as trucking companies are transitioning from using disparate tools towards centralizing their operations within a cohesive transportation system.

data.title: Curtiss-Wright and Green Hills Software Introduce High-Performance COTS Solution for Safety-Critical Avionics Systems
data.description: In ASHBURN, Virginia and SANTA BARBARA, California, Curtiss-Wright and Green Hills Software jointly unveiled a novel high-performance commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) offering. This new solution aims to extend safety-certifiable computing to a wider array of aerospace applications. It features Curtiss-Wright’s SOSA® aligned V3-1222 3U VPX processing module alongside Green Hills Software’s FACE® certified INTEGRITY®-178 tuMP™ real-time operating system (RTOS). This integrated platform promises to provide enhanced performance and safety certification for aerospace applications.

data.title: WeatherPromise closes $12.8M Series A round led by Maveron, funding to boost product dev and growth.
data.description: WeatherPromise has secured $12.8 million in new capital to boost product development, enhance strategic partnerships, and broaden its platform across consumer categories. Based in New York, the technology company is focused on increasing demand for travel, events, and recreation activities. This investment will fuel the company's growth and expansion efforts, aiming to reach a wider audience and provide innovative solutions in the market.

data.title: LuisaViaRoma partners with XY Retail for in-store innovation. Florence-based fashion retailer combining heritage craft with digital tech.
data.description: In Florence on January 13, 2026, LuisaViaRoma, a renowned fashion retailer celebrated for merging traditional Florentine artistry with cutting-edge digital solutions, announced their collaboration with XY Retail as their technology ally for advancing their physical retail approach. This partnership marks a significant step for LuisaViaRoma as they enhance their retail strategy to evolve with the changing market trends.

data.title: SafeHeal® launches IDE study for Colovac® tech in colorectal surgery promising improved patient recovery.
data.description: A new medical device innovation in colorectal cancer surgery, developed by SafeHeal®, has shown promising results for patient recovery. The company has recently started enrolling patients in its pivotal Investigational Device Exemption (IDE) study. This breakthrough device is expected to significantly enhance patient outcomes after colorectal surgery. The development comes from the collaboration between Paris and Tampa, Florida. Stay tuned for updates on this revolutionary advancement in healthcare.

data.title: Revalize launches Partner Program to drive collaboration & growth in emerging markets. Leader in CAD, CPQ, PLM solutions.
data.description: A new strategic initiative has been launched to support partners in achieving mutual success and benefitting from opportunities in growing markets. Revalize, a prominent global provider of CAD, CPQ, and PLM software for manufacturers, announced the initiative from Jacksonville, Florida on January 13, 2026. This initiative aims to strengthen collaboration and drive growth in emerging markets.

data.title: Formerly Call2Recycle, now The Battery Network, expanding nationwide network to advance sustainable battery recycling. Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: An organization, previously known as Call2Recycle, is enlarging its network across the country with the aim of maintaining important materials in circulation and promoting safer and more sustainable battery recycling on a larger scale. This initiative comes after 30 years of being recognized as the leading battery recycling entity in North America. The expansion is set to have a nationwide reach and will focus on enhancing the recycling processes for batteries. The announcement was made in Atlanta on January 13, 2026.

data.title: EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) to share long-term growth strategy for AI-driven transformation at Investor Day on March 12, 2026 in Boston.
data.description: EPAM Systems, Inc., a digital and AI transformation company, will be revealing their long-term growth strategy for the next phase of business transformation in a special Investor Day event to be held in Boston on March 12, 2026. The company's stock trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol "EPAM."

data.title: Radence chooses Palm Beach for first Precision Health Hub, showing South Florida's rise in healthcare & tech. Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: South Florida's prominence in healthcare and technology innovation is highlighted by a recent relocation. On January 13, 2026, Radence, a pioneering concierge science company, moved its operations to West Palm Beach, Florida. Specializing in personalized disease prevention and early detection, Radence aims to assist members in maintaining optimal health and functionality. This move underscores the region's expanding role in these fields.

data.title: Center for Food Action celebrates 50th anniversary with MLK Day of Service on Jan. 17, Englewood, NJ.
data.description: In Englewood, NJ on January 13, 2026, the Center for Food Action (CFA) announced their upcoming event. The CFA is set to hold its annual Martin Luther King Jr. Day of Service on January 17, which aims to celebrate Dr. King's legacy through hands-on volunteer work. This event will bring the community together for a day of service and marks the beginning of various activities.

data.title: Vulcan Materials (NYSE: VMC) will host Q4 2025 earnings call on Feb 17 at 9:00am CT. Financial results before NYSE opens.
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama, on January 13, 2026, Vulcan Materials Company, listed as VMC on NYSE, has announced that it will conduct its Q4 2025 earnings conference call on February 17, 2026, starting at 9:00 a.m. CT (10:00 a.m. ET). The financial results for the quarter will be disclosed prior to the opening of the NYSE market. The Company...

data.title: Amentum's Q1 FY 2026 earnings call on 02/10/2026 at 8:30 AM EST to discuss results ending 01/02/2026. Webcast available.
data.description: Amentum, a prominent player in cutting-edge engineering and technology solutions, is set to conduct a conference call on February 10, 2026, at 8:30 AM EST to review its financial performance for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026, which concluded on January 2, 2026. Ahead of the call, a press release disclosing the outcomes will be published. The conference call will be webcast live to the public via a link on Amentum's Investor Relations Website. Additionally, a recording of the call will be available for later access.
